title: Varicose vein symptoms

red_flags.text: Supports clinician documentation of pain, aching, discomfort, swelling, heaviness, itching, skin change, bleeding, thrombophlebitis, ulcer and patient questions without asserting complication.
red_flags.rationale: Relevant to entered symptoms and complication discussion without diagnosing varicose veins.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Supports clinician documentation of pain, aching, discomfort, swelling, heaviness, itching, skin change, bleeding, thrombophlebitis, ulcer and patient questions without asserting complication.

source.title: Varicose veins: diagnosis and management — Recommendations

red_flags.text: Supports recording bleeding, troublesome symptoms, skin change, hard painful veins and active or healed ulcer context; referral remains a clinician decision adapted to local pathways.
red_flags.rationale: Relevant to clinician-assessed features without generating referral.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Supports recording bleeding, troublesome symptoms, skin change, hard painful veins and active or healed ulcer context; referral remains a clinician decision adapted to local pathways.

source.title: Varicose veins: diagnosis and management — Recommendations

investigations.text: Supports clinician-reviewed duplex results and pregnancy context without generating imaging, intervention or compression advice.
investigations.rationale: Relevant to already reviewed duplex and entered pregnancy context without selecting action.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Vein appearance, site, pain, swelling, heaviness, itching, skin, ulcer, bleeding, hard vein, pregnancy, examination and duplex are absent.
No diagnosis, DVT exclusion, imaging, compression, procedure or referral is generated.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
